caption: A man with glasses and a distinctive tall, grey, textured wig is seated in what appears to be a clothing store or studio, with apparel and framed photos visible in the background. He is wearing a white shirt, a red bowtie, and tan suspenders, and he has black headphones over his ears. A professional black microphone is positioned in front of him. To his left and right, the text "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" is displayed as a semi-transparent overlay on the screen. Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar seated position, speaking while looking slightly to his left. His facial expressions and mouth movements shift as he talks, but his overall posture and the surrounding environment, including the clothing racks and wall decor, remain stationary throughout the clip.
